title: NGS Library Prep for Targeted Sequencing of DNA Methylation Patterns in Cell-Free DNA: Step 3 of 5: PCR 1
author: Opentrons
description: Part 3 of 5: Bisulfite converted DNA (output from step 2) is set up for a PCR amplification step. For plasma samples (but not saliva) the protocol includes post-PCR clean up steps. Links: * [Part 1: DNA Extraction](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23) * [Part 2: Bisulfite Conversion](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-bisulfite_conversion) * [Part 3: PCR1](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pcr1) * [Part 4: PCR2](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pcr2) * [Part 5: Pooling](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pooling) With this work flow, your robot will use reagents from the Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit [Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit](https://www.zymoresearch.com/collections/ez-dna-methylation-gold-kits) to perform the custom steps (DNA extraction, Bisulfite Conversion, PCR1, PCR2, Pooling) detailed in the HKG SOP.[HKG SOP](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-04/vw23kchHKG%20Standard%20Operating%20Procedure%20for%20DNA%20extraction%20Targeted%20next%20generation%20sequencing%20and%20.xlsx). This is part 3 of the work flow: Bisulfite Conversion. This step performs set up for PCR amplification (with additional post-PCR clean up steps for plasma samples only) using the output samples from step 2 (Bisulfite Conversion). After the steps carried out in this protocol (part 3), proceed with part 4: PCR2.
steps_raw: Part 3 of 5: Bisulfite converted DNA (output from step 2) is set up for a PCR amplification step. For plasma samples (but not saliva) the protocol includes post-PCR clean up steps. Links: * [Part 1: DNA Extraction](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23) * [Part 2: Bisulfite Conversion](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-bisulfite_conversion) * [Part 3: PCR1](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pcr1) * [Part 4: PCR2](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pcr2) * [Part 5: Pooling](http://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/76ba23-pooling) With this work flow, your robot will use reagents from the Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit [Zymoresearch EZ DNA Methylation-Gold Kit](https://www.zymoresearch.com/collections/ez-dna-methylation-gold-kits) to perform the custom steps (DNA extraction, Bisulfite Conversion, PCR1, PCR2, Pooling) detailed in the HKG SOP.[HKG SOP](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-03-04/vw23kchHKG%20Standard%20Operating%20Procedure%20for%20DNA%20extraction%20Targeted%20next%20generation%20sequencing%20and%20.xlsx). This is part 3 of the work flow: Bisulfite Conversion. This step performs set up for PCR amplification (with additional post-PCR clean up steps for plasma samples only) using the output samples from step 2 (Bisulfite Conversion). After the steps carried out in this protocol (part 3), proceed with part 4: PCR2.
Distribute sample and pcr1 master mix to the PCR plate.
Pause for the following steps (OT-2 deck lights will signal pauses):
(Plasma only) Bead clean up, elute and transfer eluate to fresh PCR plate.
